query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_votes, COUNT(DISTINCT teacherNameId) as unique_teachers FROM teacher_votes WHERE votingPeriodId = (SELECT id FROM voting_periods WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_votes, COUNT(DISTINCT teacherNameId) as unique_teachers FROM teacher_votes WHERE votingPeriodId = (SELECT id FROM voting_periods WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
